reviews.text: An absolute powerhouse league in the industry of accident cases in my honest opinion. A personal shout out to Mr. Aaron and Mr. Fermin. All good things come from God above, immediately by word of mouth I got the information to call these guys to represent me to help me by somebody who witnessed the accident a civilian that came up to me and offered me this blessing I called them standing right in the middle of the accident after it happened, and at that moment Mr Fermin told me to go home and wait for my call, after giving him all the essential information recorded by the officer on the accident that's exactly what I did. I got home I got a call from Mr fermin, telling me to be patient kick my feet up and relax they would take care of everything, things like this I'm aware take time,  he was always kind and professional and courteous and was always attentive to my needs even before I even knew to ask of them, if there was questions that I had I was able to contact them directly via a phone number that he's personally gave me to contact him at and offered to be of service to me and anything that I had regarding anything in the accident and the case moving forward, for my case start to finish roughly 6 months to complete, I was able to obtain and replace what I lost and then some, I'm very grateful to them having met them in person to close the deal and to go back on with my life I recommend them to anybody if they are ever in a situation that they're unsure on what to do or where to go or how to go about it, these guys gave me comfort, compassion, understanding, relatability, and peace of mind through the whole process! I cannot say enough great things about the experience I had with April Injury Law, but more specifically April, herself. After suffering back and neck injuries in a car accident, I found myself navigating an overwhelming process involving multiple insurance companies, medical providers, and legal complexities. This was my first time working with legal representation, and I couldn’t have asked for a better advocate.

April came highly recommended by my son, who also worked with her after his accident. From the first moment, she handled everything with professionalism, care, and attention to detail. She managed communications with my auto insurance company, the at-fault driver’s insurance, my health insurance, and the doctor’s office—all of which allowed me to focus on recovery.

She also assisted in arranging a vehicle appraiser to conduct a thorough inspection of my car and document the resulting damage from the accident. This detailed assessment was instrumental in supporting my claim with the insurance companies. April’s attention to every aspect of my case was remarkable, and her expertise made the process far less stressful.

As a military veteran, I tend to push through pain and discomfort, but she wisely encouraged me to take my injuries seriously and seek the appropriate treatment. Because of her guidance, I received excellent care that helped my pain and set me on the right path for future physical therapy and continued treatment. Her genuine concern for my well-being extended far beyond the legal case itself.

What impressed me most was how personal and attentive she was throughout the process. Despite having other clients, she always made me feel like a priority. She even took the time to check in on me between court appearances to see how I was doing after one of my doctors appointments. A level of care that is rare and deeply appreciated.

Thanks to her exceptional representation, I was able to move forward after a very traumatic experience. I highly recommend April Injury Law to anyone in need of a personal injury attorney. April is not only a skilled professional but also a compassionate and dedicated advocate. I am forever grateful for her help and guidance.

Thank you, April!

reviews.ownerResponse:
Rich: Thank you so much for your kind words and encouragement. I really do appreciate it. The unfortunate thing is that even when there is what one would consider clear liability on the part of a casino, they deny your claim. They then defend and delay the case as long as they can. They search every medical record in your past and attack you trying to make you feel as if you did something wrong because you got hurt due to their negligence. Their goal is to beat you into submission and increase their profits despite the human costs to the injured person. It is truly a "profits over people" mentality, and they have hordes of lawyers who are more than willing to do their dirty work for them. That is why I choose to stand with good people like you and fight for justice. I do it ne case at a time. We can be proud that when the casino wrongfully denied your claim, we did not cave in, but stood toe to toe with the casino. But, as you know, that was only half of the story. Once we obtained a settlement from the casino, the health insurance company made a claim that it was entitled to most of the settle money! So that started a second battle that we had to fight. I am glad to say that n the end, we were successful and that we were able to resolve all aspects of you case.
Thank you again.
Craig Murphy

Being in an accident is hard enough. But dealing with the aftermath can be a tough, confusing time. Craig made everything easy to understand throughout the entire process and because of this I was able to put the accident behind me, and heal much quicker. I am lucky that I have Craig as my attorney.
Five years later, my girlfriend and I were struck by a hit and run driver. She went to the hospital while I stayed with the vehicle. I sustained a concussion that was not diagnosed by a doctor. Once again, Craig was notified and went into action. Most attorneys would not have pursued my interests as vigorously as Craig. Due to his efforts, he persisted and got me a settlement amount as well as my girlfriend. We are proud to say that Craig is our attorney and recommend anyone that has been involved in an accident to contact him immediately.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Paul:
Thank you for your very kind words and your recommendation. Most people do not know what people go through when they are injured in a car crash. They also do not know that the insurance companies have one goal, and that is to pay you nothing or as little as possible. The insurance companies have teams of adjusters and countless employees who all have that goal. Even in cases of clear liability and injuries, the insurance companies put up a fight. They dig into your background and put you under a microscope trying to find anything they can to avoid their responsibility. They even search people's Facebook account and other social media accounts trying to find anything that they can try to use against you. reviews.text:
I would like to start this review by saying I typically do not write or review any form of businesses online ( yelp, google etc..) and prefer to decide if I am going to conduct business with a company or individual based on word of mouth.

However I had such a great experience with this firm I felt it should be shared here also, to hopefully help others find support and help when faced with a similar situation that I was in myself.

Mr. Jon Remmel was referred to me by a very close personal friend who also happens to be another attorney in Nevada. He did not feel he was equipped to handle the sensitivity and specificity of my legal case and informed me  he had heard nothing but positive things about Jon and felt he would definitely be of assistance. I was previously conducting my own research for Personal Injury firms  handling matters involving aviation but did not have any success.

I began working with Mr. Jon Remmel, and the other members of his firm         ( Vanessa and Dana)  in  2018 and can report nothing but  positive experiences.

My case was very personal and important to me, and they remained diligent and kept my wishes and goals a priority throughout the entire duration of my case.

I have a demanding job and work long hours, which can make communication with me difficult (during business hours), however, they where incredibly flexible, informative, and answered all of my questions and concerns. ( and trust me a I had a lot)

I never felt like " a number" or just another client while working with this firm, and I am still current working with them finalizing the last portions of my case while writing this review.  Every time I call, everyone remembers the details of my case immediately and provides me with nothing but amazing service and support.

If anyone reading this has ever been involved in a personal legal matter, they can understand that this can be a very emotionally taxing process, and can involve highs and lows. Even when I was feeling discouraged,  I was treated incredibly kindly and respectfully.

I feel that Jon and his team, ( Dana and Vanessa) truly took the importance of this matter to heart and did everything in their power to help me reach a positive outcome as well as personal closure.

Thank you for a phenomenal experience and outcome, and thank you for helping turn such a negative event in my life into something a little less difficult to cope with. You three are truly incredible, thank you for all that you do.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Jamie for taking the time to let others know how hard we work for our clients. We may be small, but we get big results!
Thanks Ivan!
